nodes.title: Start a new Batch of 3 Sample Gens

2. After all 3 sample gens finish, use the slider below to select which one you like. If you don't see a slider below, make sure Nodes 2.0 is turned off in comfyUI settings.
3. Next, toggle FINISH MODE to "YES" below.
4. Click "Manual Random Seed" to begin finalizing your selected Stage 1 latent to your target resolution.
1. Always start your new gen from the below "Manual Random Seed" button to give your Stage 1 gens new seeds.
